title: lithocardium suaveolens
intro: Lithocardium suaveolens is a plant species also known as the sweet root or lithospermum suaveolens, which belongs to the borage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of lithocardium suaveolens include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of angina and palpitations, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, lithocardium suaveolens is often used in the form of dried root or as an extract, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
